title: Platonic
author: Marisa G. Franco
subline: How the science of attachment can help you make — and keep — friends.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Two abstract human silhouettes facing each other, hands extended. Between them, a red square (the 'platonic' space — not a heart, not a hug, just connection). -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none">
    <!-- Left figure -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round">
      <circle cx="-340" cy="-260" r="80"/>
      <line x1="-340" y1="-180" x2="-340" y2="120"/>
      <line x1="-340" y1="-100" x2="-460" y2="0"/>
      <line x1="-340" y1="-100" x2="-220" y2="-40"/>
      <line x1="-340" y1="120" x2="-400" y2="280"/>
      <line x1="-340" y1="120" x2="-280" y2="280"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Right figure (mirror) -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round">
      <circle cx="340" cy="-260" r="80"/>
      <line x1="340" y1="-180" x2="340" y2="120"/>
      <line x1="340" y1="-100" x2="220" y2="-40"/>
      <line x1="340" y1="-100" x2="460" y2="0"/>
      <line x1="340" y1="120" x2="280" y2="280"/>
      <line x1="340" y1="120" x2="400" y2="280"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Hands meeting -->
    <line x1="-220" y1="-40" x2="220" y2="-40" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <!-- The red square between them — the platonic space, no romance implied -->
    <rect x="-60" y="-100" width="120" height="120" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="-40" r="8" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Caption -->
    <text x="0" y="380" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">FRIENDSHIP, NOT ROMANCE</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Two ash silhouettes face each other, hands extended and meeting. Between them floats a single red square — not a heart, not a ring, but a defined platonic space. A small red dot sits at its center. 'Friendship, not romance' is the caption. Title 520px mixed case, single word 'Platonic' at the top — the whole cover says it.
